text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Satsuki Sho and the weather is
stormy. We head to the racecourse by taxi, but
get stuck in traffic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, we're going to be late for the race.
Satono Diamond gets out of the taxi and runs the
rest of the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suspects it's all due to her family jinx.
However, it makes her all the more determined to
become strong enough to break it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the paddock as soon as I get to the
racecourse. It looks like Satono Diamond made it
in time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now it's time to race in the Satsuki Sho!
